positive: A stylized, abstract geometric pattern featuring interconnected celestial bodies, constellations, and flowing magical nebulae. The color palette should be deep indigo, cosmic violet, luminous teal, and brilliant gold foil accents. The composition must be perfectly circular and centered, ideal for repetition or placement on apparel. Style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern mystical vector art. Strong contrast between dark space and glowing light sources. Minimalist silhouette of a crescent moon and a stylized comet traverse the design. Print-friendly, high saturation, ultra-detailed, clean vector look, centered focus, 8k.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, low resolution, grain, messy, muted colors
